name: tlsGetLastErrorAsString
title: tlsGetLastErrorAsString
syntax: long tlsGetLastErrorAsString(dword socket, char buffer[], dword bufferLength );
description: Retrieves the error message of the last operation that failed on a specified socket.
return: 0: The error message was written into the text buffer. In case of an invalid error code, the error message has the format "Unknown error: x" assuming the last error code x for the specified socket.
